refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management system for baselines and calibration history
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated performance requirements management system combining derivation algorithms, traceable recording, and update management

potential_sources: Tight coupling between derivation algorithms and data storage
Update management dependent on accurate recording
coupling_check.notes: The integrated DP logically groups related functions to minimize cross-module dependencies and supports traceability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate and timely worksite mission data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not robust
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management separately if complexity grows to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: System-level module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance targets to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data synchronization and update propagation

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as this module owns the full performance requirements lifecycle; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited relevance; assigning here would cause high diffusion and duplication.
Teleoperation module unrelated to performance requirements derivation and management.
Safety Services may consume performance data but should not own derivation or management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing performance requirements derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module if other unrelated functions are added
Dependency on external data interfaces may introduce integration challenges
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly mapped to candidate DPs with logical grouping and traceability maintained.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing in NGHE Solution module
Potential integration complexity with external interfaces
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functional requirements to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution if complexity increases
Ensure robust interface definitions for Telemetry and Network Link to mitigate integration risks

decision.justification: The decomposition and assignments are sound but refinement of update management DP and potential sub-modularization within NGHE Solution is advisable to manage complexity and maintain clarity.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To modularize update management and reduce coupling within the integrated DP.

assumptions: Worksite mission data is accurate and timely
NGHE Solution module can handle integrated functionality without excessive complexity
open_risks: Data inconsistency risk if update management is not robust
evidence_needed: Demonstration of traceability from worksite inputs to performance targets
History logs of baseline and calibration updates
Interface test results for Telemetry and Network Link
